src/test/java/br/ufpr/tads/msbantadsauth.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile for the application context tests to ensure correct configuration loading.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.0.1 to 3.2.0 to align with JDK 21 support and new features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable relational database access.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter to support sending emails.
Add Spring Security starter to implement authentication and authorization.
Add Bean Validation starter to support input validation annotations.
Add Flyway core for database migration management.
Add Spring Boot Docker Compose support for local development environments.
Add H2 in-memory database driver for testing or development.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for production database connectivity.
Add Lombok to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities and classes.
Add Spring Security Test for unit testing security configurations.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged executable JAR.
Remove Spring AMQP starter as it is no longer needed in this version of the service.
Remove Spring Data MongoDB starter as the persistence layer has switched to JPA.
Remove Spring Rabbit Test dependency corresponding to the removed AMQP starter.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution version from 3.8.6 to 3.9.5 to align with newer tooling standards.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 3.1.0 to 3.2.0.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0 to align with the new project structure.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0' and updated download URLs to point to maven-wrapper-3.2.0.jar.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax for better readability and nesting support.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced instances of `command` with $(command) throughout the script, e.g., `uname` to $(uname).

mvnw.general_idea: Remove support for the legacy M2_HOME environment variable, relying solely on the wrapper jar location.
mvnw.human_impl: Deleted the block resolving M2_HOME from symlinks and removed M2_HOME from the final exec command arguments.

mvnw.general_idea: Implement SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded Maven wrapper JAR to ensure integrity.
mvnw.human_impl: Added logic to read wrapperSha256Sum from properties and verify the JAR using sha256sum or shasum before execution.

mvnw.general_idea: Improve robustness on Windows by stripping carriage returns from configuration values.
mvnw.human_impl: Added tr -d '\r' when reading wrapperUrl and tr -s '\r\n' in concat_lines to handle CRLF line endings.

mvnw.general_idea: Centralize verbose logging into a dedicated function for cleaner code.
mvnw.human_impl: Introduced a log() function that checks MVNW_VERBOSE and replaced scattered echo statements with log calls.

mvnw.general_idea: Correctly pass command line arguments to the Java process by using $* instead of $@ in MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 3.1.0 to 3.2.0 to align with the new project dependencies.
Rename the internal variable from DOWNLOAD_URL to WRAPPER_URL to match the updated Maven Wrapper script conventions.
Add SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded Maven Wrapper JAR to ensure integrity and security.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly configure the server port to 8080.
Define the Spring Boot application name for service identification.
Enable JDK 21 virtual threads for improved concurrency performance.
Set the PostgreSQL JDBC driver class for database connectivity.
Configure database username and password with environment variable fallbacks.
Set the JDBC connection URL for the PostgreSQL database.
Enable Flyway for database migration management.
Disable automatic Hibernate schema generation to rely on Flyway migrations.
Disable SQL statement logging in JPA for production readiness.
Set the root logging level to INFO.
Set SQL logging level to DEBUG for detailed query visibility.
